name: card-redemption-platform
description: 卡密兑换平台 — 闲鱼数字商品安全兑换与即时交付（MVP）

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w services/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/contracts && npm run typecheck -w services/api
